parameter.value: Welcome to the KARMA CASINO, |PLAYERNAME|. This is a lounge reserved only for true millionaires and power game legends! Ready to risk your fortune?
Hold on, |PLAYERNAME|. At Karma Casino, we treat each VIP with exclusivity.
A true high-roller always knows when to take a break. Come back stronger.
Until next time, legend of luxury.
Vanished? Probably off spending more millions...
Maybe once you feel lucky enough to handle the Karma heat.
This table is for the elite, my friend. Come back when you're truly dripping in gold.
